title: How do I search by a specific column?
excerpt:
While Search Everything is cool its also… too much. Where or how do I search by a column in a particular table? 
I have unique ID numbers on a particular table that we use internally. But I can’t search for them easily b…

posts.author: BAi_Ryan (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
While Search Everything is cool its also… too much. Where or how do I search by a column in a particular table?

I have unique ID numbers on a particular table that we use internally. But I can’t search for them easily because if I search for say 123 it will also find any phone number, business name, or address that has the same sequence. Is there a way to search by column?

Find 123 in Unique ID field or something similar?

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BAi_Ryan Welcome to the Monday Community!

Have you tried using the Filter option?

image1043×331 28 KB

You can also save specific filters to different views. Useful if you search the same thing often.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
